hypothesis: ep=100 gives ~24 epochs after LR scheduler fires (~ep71) to converge at lr=0.005
root_cause: LR scheduler fired at ~ep71. Model gained +0.005 from ep71→100 but plateaued around 0.9419-0.9420. Second LR drop (lr→0.0025) was just starting at ep95-100 when training ended.
retry_strategy: epochs=150 — gives ~50 more epochs after current plateau, allowing second LR drop to fully propagate. Expected additional gain: +0.005 to push past threshold 0.9469.
